data.content: export abstract class AXFormatter { abstract get name(): string; abstract format(value: unknown, options?: AXFormatOptions | string): string; }

methods.content:
/**
 * The unique name used for registration and lookup.
 */
get name(): string

/**
 * Formats a value with optional options.
 * @returns The formatted value.
 */
format(value: unknown, options?: AXFormatOptions | string): string
